message:
fix(data): sync star counts and tool metrics across files

- Update flywheel.ts metrics: toolCount 11→12 (includes csctf utility)
- Update flywheel.ts totalStars: "2K+"→"3.8K+" to match actual counts
- Sync star counts between flywheel.ts and tldr-content.ts
- Updated tools: ntm, mail, ubs, bv, cass, cm, slb, dcg, ru

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
